files.patch:
@@ -21,7 +21,7 @@ jobs:
         uses: actions/checkout@v6.0.2
 
       - name: Setup Go
-        uses: actions/setup-go@v6.3.0
+        uses: actions/setup-go@v6.4.0
         with:
           go-version-file: go.mod
           cache: true

@@ -21,7 +21,7 @@ jobs:

-        uses: actions/setup-go@v6.3.0
